violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the beginning of inspection. One person to be certified on site at all times. CFSM arrived in middle of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Chicken was observed held at 82 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC chicken was recently cooked. Chicken was reheated. Chicken to no longer be stored above grill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC diluted solution to test between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The reach-in door handle is held together with tape. Handle to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
